channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [MEHIF] Mehta Integrated Finance Ltd. Receives Court Order to Freeze Shares of Judgement Debtors
item.description:
Mehta Integrated Finance Ltd. has received a court order from the City Civil Court at Ahmedabad, dated 01.04.2026, directing the garnishes to attach the shares held by the present judgement debtors. The order was served on 04.04.2026 to the company and the opposite party. The court has ordered to freeze the shares of the Judgement Debtors lying with the garnishees and dividends accrued thereon with immediate effect. The order is applicable since 2007. The financial implications are yet to be finalised, but the company is allowed to attach the shares held by the present judgement debtors to prevent further transfer or alienation. The court has also imposed a restriction for attaching the shares of the Radhe Developers India Limited, a listed company on BSE Ltd.

  • Mehta Integrated Finance Ltd. receives court order to freeze shares of judgement debtors
  • Order served on 04.04.2026 by Commercial Court at City Civil Court, Ahmedabad
  • Garnishes directed to freeze shares and dividends accrued thereon with immediate effect
  • Order applicable since 2007
  • Company allowed to attach shares of judgement debtors to prevent further transfer or alienation
  • Restriction imposed for attaching shares of Radhe Developers India Limited, a listed company on BSE Ltd.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MEHTA INTEGRATED FINANCE LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [IL&FSENGG] IL&FS Engineering and Construction Company Ltd Reports Defaults on Loan Repayments as of 31st March, 2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

IL&FS Engineering and Construction Company Ltd has disclosed defaults on payment of interest and repayment of principal amounts for loans from banks and financial institutions, as well as unlisted debt securities. The total financial indebtedness of the company, including short-term and long-term debt, stands at INR 3097.07 crore. The company has clarified that no interest is being accrued or provided post the cutoff date, except for the Funded Interest Term Loan (FITL). The disclosures have been made in accordance with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/CMD1/CIR/P/2019/140 dated 21st November 2019.

  • IL&FS Engineering and Construction Company Ltd reports defaults on loan repayments as of 31st March, 2026.
  • The total financial indebtedness of the company stands at INR 3097.07 crore.
  • No interest is being accrued or provided post the cutoff date, except for the Funded Interest Term Loan (FITL).
  • The disclosures have been made in accordance with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/CMD1/CIR/P/2019/140 dated 21st November 2019.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IL&FS ENGINEERING AND CONSTRUCTION COMPANY LTD. | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [KESAR] Kesar India Ltd. to Approve Audited Financial Results for Q4 & FY 2026 on April 08, 2026
item.description:
Kesar India Ltd. has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on April 08, 2026, through video conferencing, to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results (Standalone and Consolidated) for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The meeting is in compliance with the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The 'Trading Window' for dealing/trading in the shares of the company was closed from April 01, 2026, and will remain closed till 48 hours after the closure of the Board Meeting.

  • Kesar India Ltd. to consider and approve Audited Financial Results for Q4 & FY 2026 on April 08, 2026
  • Meeting to be held through video conferencing in compliance with SEBI regulations
  • Trading Window for shares closed from April 01, 2026, and will remain closed till 48 hours after the Board Meeting

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kesar India Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [MEGRISOFT] Megri Soft Ltd Promoter Group Confirms Holding of 74.99% Shares as of March 31, 2026
item.description:
Megri Soft Ltd has disclosed the yearly disclosure under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (SAST) for the financial year ended on March 31, 2026. Mr. Mohnesh Kohli, on behalf of the Promoter and Promoter Group, confirmed that they, along with Persons Acting in Concert (PAC), hold 74.99% of Megri Soft Limited's equity shares as of March 31, 2026. No encumbrance was made on the shares held by the Promoters during the financial year ended March 31, 2026, and no shares were encumbered or pledged as of the same date.

  • Megri Soft Ltd Promoter Group holds 74.99% shares as of March 31, 2026
  • No encumbrance made on shares during the financial year ended March 31, 2026
  • No shares encumbered or pledged as of March 31, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Megri Soft Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [YESBANK] Yes Bank Ltd Reports Q4 and FY26 Results: Loans & Advances Grow by 10.7%, Deposits Increase by 12.1%
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Yes Bank Ltd has released provisional financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The bank reported a growth of 10.7% in Loans & Advances and 12.1% in Deposits compared to the same period last year. The Credit to Deposit Ratio stands at 86.5% and the Liquidity Coverage Ratio (LCR) is at 125.0%. The figures are yet to be approved by the Audit Committee of the Board, Board of Directors and the Statutory Auditors.

  • Loans & Advances grow by 10.7% compared to the same period last year
  • Deposits increase by 12.1% compared to the same period last year
  • Credit to Deposit Ratio stands at 86.5%
  • Liquidity Coverage Ratio (LCR) is at 125.0%

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: YES BANK LTD. | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [BLUECLOUDS] Blue Cloud Softech Solutions Ltd Adjourns Board Meeting to Consider Preferential Allotment
item.description:
Blue Cloud Softech Solutions Ltd has informed BSE that the meeting of the Board of Directors of the Company, scheduled on 06/04/2026, was adjourned to enable further deliberations and consideration of additional information in relation to the proposed preferential allotment. The meeting was initially convened and held on Saturday, April 4th, 2026, where the Board decided to adjourn the meeting. The adjourned meeting will now be held on Monday, 6th April, 2026, to consider and evaluate the proposal for issuance of equity shares on a preferential basis, subject to receipt of requisite statutory, regulatory and other approvals. The trading window for dealing in the securities of the Company by Designated Persons and their immediate relatives remains closed and shall reopen 48 hours after the outcome of the adjourned Board Meeting is made public.

  • Blue Cloud Softech Solutions Ltd board meeting scheduled on 06/04/2026 to consider preferential allotment
  • Meeting adjourned to enable further deliberations and consideration of additional information
  • Adjourned meeting to be held on Monday, 6th April, 2026 to evaluate the proposal
  • Proposal subject to receipt of requisite statutory, regulatory and other approvals
  • Trading window for dealing in the securities of the Company by Designated Persons and their immediate relatives remains closed

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Blue Cloud Softech Solutions Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [PUSHPIN] Pushpsons Industries Promoter Declares Unencumbered Shareholdings
item.description:
Pushpsons Industries Ltd, in accordance with Regulation 31[a) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, announced that promoter Pankaj Fain, holding 25.26% equity shares in the company, declared that as of March 3, 2026, the entire promoter's holdings of 63.93% Equity Shares, which include co-promoter's and PACs shareholdings, have not been encumbered directly or indirectly during the financial year ended March 3, 2026.

  • Pushpsons Industries Ltd promoter Pankaj Fain declares unencumbered shareholdings
  • 25.26% equity shares unencumbered as of March 3, 2026
  • Entire promoter's holdings amount to 63.93% Equity Shares
  • No encumbrance directly or indirectly during the financial year ended March 3, 2026
  • Announcement made in accordance with SEBI regulations

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PUSHPSONS INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [BLUECLOUDS] Blue Cloud Softech Solutions Ltd. Adjourns Board Meeting to Consider Preferential Allotment
item.description:
Blue Cloud Softech Solutions Ltd. announced that the Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 4th, 2026, decided to adjourn the meeting to enable further deliberations and consideration of additional information in relation to the proposed preferential allotment. The decision was made in accordance with the Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements Regulations, 2015. The adjourned meeting is scheduled for Monday, 6th April, 2026, to consider and evaluate the proposal for issuance of equity shares on a preferential basis, subject to necessary approvals. The trading window for dealing in the securities of the Company by Designated Persons and their immediate relatives remains closed until 48 hours after the outcome of the adjourned Board Meeting is made public.

  • Blue Cloud Softech Solutions Ltd. adjourned their Board Meeting to consider a proposed preferential allotment.
  • The decision was made in accordance with the Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements Regulations, 2015.
  • The adjourned meeting is scheduled for Monday, 6th April, 2026, to evaluate the proposal for issuance of equity shares on a preferential basis.
  • The decision to adjourn the meeting was made to enable further deliberations and consideration of additional information.
  • The trading window for dealing in the securities of the Company by Designated Persons and their immediate relatives remains closed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Blue Cloud Softech Solutions Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AARTISURF] Aarti Surfactants Ltd Launches Second 100-Day Campaign 'Saksham Niveshak' for Unpaid Dividends
item.description:
Aarti Surfactants Ltd has initiated the Second 100-Day Campaign 'Saksham Niveshak' in compliance with the request from the Investor Education and Protection Fund Authority (IEPFA) under the Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA). The campaign aims to reach out to shareholders whose dividends remain unpaid or unclaimed. Shareholders are required to update their KYC and other related details to claim any unpaid or unclaimed dividends before they get transferred to the IEPF. The campaign will run from April 01, 2026, to July 09, 2026.

  • Aarti Surfactants Ltd launches the Second 100-Day Campaign 'Saksham Niveshak' as per the request from IEPFA under MCA.
  • The campaign aims to reach out to shareholders with unpaid or unclaimed dividends.
  • Shareholders are required to update their KYC and other related details to claim their dividends.
  • The campaign will run from April 01, 2026, to July 09, 2026.
  • Unclaimed dividends may be transferred to the IEPF if not claimed within seven consecutive years.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Aarti Surfactants Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [PARVATI] Parvati Sweetners and Power Ltd: Promoters' Regulation 31(4) Disclosure for FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Parvati Sweetners and Power Ltd. released the yearly disclosure under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from the promoters of the company for the financial year ended 31st March 2026. The promoters held 9,84,34,606 equity shares of the company as of 31st March 2026, without any encumbrance during the financial year. The disclosure was digitally signed by Poonam Chouksey, Managing Director.

  • Parvati Sweetners and Power Ltd promoters' Regulation 31(4) disclosure for FY 2025-2026
  • Promoters held 9,84,34,606 equity shares as of 31st March 2026
  • No encumbrance of shares directly or indirectly during the financial year
  • Disclosure signed by Poonam Chouksey, Managing Director
  • Released pursuant to SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeover) Regulations, 2011

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Parvati Sweetners and Power Ltd | Category: Monthly Update
